scroll_found.title: Research the Revive Crystal scroll at a Research Pedestal

revive_crystal.title: Craft a Revive Crystal — requires Heart Crystal + Crystal Core + Ghast Tear + Netherite + Totem

subtitle.text: The Crystal Core heals 33%. The Revive Crystal heals everything. The cost is the difference between them.

description: ▸ The Revive Crystal is the Lifesteal mod's
On multiplayer: revives a dead player,
On singleplayer: full heal + respawn anchor.
The scroll explains what each crystal type does
and how to build the chain.
Source: Heart Ore (Y -50 to 70 overworld, Nether below roof)
Permanent HP increase — does not deplete
└ Use on dead player's ghost/body: revives them
restores hearts lost from Lifesteal PvP deaths
└ This is the counter to heart loss in PvP servers
└ Crafting one is considered a peace offering
└ In singleplayer: no PvP, so hearts only go up
└ Crystal still useful: full heal in boss fights
└ Use as emergency healing in the Cataclysm chain
└ Keep one in inventory during Emulator fight
└ Found in Lifesteal Heart Ore structures,
post-boss loot caches, high-tier dungeon chests
Revive Crystal recipe, multiplayer heart mechanics
▸ The Crystal does not undo what happened.
It starts from where things are,
◇ Totem of Undying + Revive Crystal in inventory:
Double death protection during the Wither Storm fight.
The Storm is the most dangerous encounter in Ch12.
